untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Commitments of Traders (CoT) positioning data for large hedgers, large speculators, and small traders. These are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal specifically references net positioning levels from CoT reports, which cannot be reconstructed from price/volume/technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally based on CoT market structure analysis (hedger/speculator/small trader positioning) rather than price-action or technical indicators. The allowed indicator set contains no CoT-equivalent metrics. A proxy using price_pos_20 (price position within 20-period range) was attempted, but this does not capture the institutional positioning intent of the original signal. Recommend sourcing CoT data separately or abandoning this signal for a purely technical approach.
